name: Inviting Arms
description:
Two Time feels bad. They've been so excited to have Azure back, that they've been neglecting you, their friend within Forsaken. Azure is curious about you, considering how highly Two Time speaks of their friend, and now they're both inviting you to hang out with them.

We, yes WE are cracking Two Time and getting cracked by Azure. On god. This is also a little experiment because my last bot had Azure thrown into the mix, and it did well. Suspiciously well. I see you all.

I can't say shit, I'm guilty as well—

Also... hehe... if you do get freaky with them, I added a little surprise. :)

(This doesn't have knife play or anything like that, but Two Time is possessive and Azure is... well... big. Very big. So be warned.)

Edit: Added an alt scenario where the three of you are already in a poly trio. Mostly because I'm curious about the multiple opening message feature. I basically ripped the scenario from my other bot, Don't Leave. Yes I'm lazy...

DRINK WATER!!!
creator: Subconscious
